subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Hearken thou unto the call of the Wronged One, Who summoneth thee from the precincts of His Most Great Prison and calleth thee with that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین ان استمع ندآء المظلوم الذی ینادیک من شطر سجنه الاعظم و یدعوک بما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @power of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wisdom [hikmat]
